finding.summary: The stereo balance is shifted 3.6 dB towards the left channel, causing an off-center image.
finding.probable_cause: Input channel mismatch or recording imbalance between left and right.
finding.confidence_reason: Low silence fraction and clear stereo balance measurement provide direct evidence.

evidence_refs.description: Stereo balance (L-R difference) of 3.6 dB, indicating left channel is louder.

proposal.reason: Attenuate the left channel to roughly compensate the 3.6 dB imbalance and center the guitar image.
